sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_xml (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_content XMLType);
SELECT id, xml_content.schemaValidate() + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_xml WHERE id = 1) AS validation_result FROM test_xml;
SELECT id, xml_content.schemaValidate() + (1 + 2 - NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_xml), 0)) AS mixed_result FROM test_xml WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 FLOAT, num2 FLOAT);
SELECT num1 + num2 AS sum, XMLType('<valid><item>' || (num1 + num2) || '</item></valid>', 'file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd').schemaValidate() FROM test_numbers;
SELECT id, xml_content.schemaValidate() + (SELECT AVG(num1) FROM test_numbers) AS avg_num_result FROM test_xml WHERE id = 1;
SELECT empty_col + ' appended' AS appended_string, XMLType('<valid><item>' || (empty_col + ' appended') || '</item></valid>', 'file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd').schemaValidate() FROM test_empty;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, XMLType('<valid><count>' || COUNT(*) + (SELECT MAX(num1) FROM test_numbers) || '</count></valid>', 'file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd').schemaValidate() FROM test_xml;
